title: Detect hardcoded secrets
description: Hardcoded secrets like API keys, passwords, or tokens in source code create severe security vulnerabilities. These secrets can be discovered by anyone with access to the code, leading to unauthorized system access and data breaches.
recommendation: Store secrets in environment variables, secure vaults, or configuration management systems.

noncompliant.description: Hardcoded secrets like API keys, tokens, and certificates expose sensitive information in source code.

compliant.description: Use environment variables, secure files, or dedicated secret management services instead of hardcoding secrets.

checks.message: Store secrets in environment variables, secure vaults, or configuration management systems.
